title: RedNote/小红书 Launch Execution Plan
description: Finalize the existing 小红书 strategy into execution-ready assets with Chinese content, plus create a Chinese README.

scope.in: Polish 6 Chinese drafts, verify hashtags, confirm 4-week calendar, format visuals for RedNote platform. Create README.zh-CN.md. Build on existing xiaohongshu-strategy.
scope.out: No new platform research. No execution (posting) — just preparation. English README content untouched.

dod.criterion: 6 小红书 posts are polished in Chinese and ready to copy-paste with hooks, body, CTA, hashtags
4-week content calendar has specific dates, times, and which post goes when
Visual assets (GIF, screenshots) are confirmed compatible with RedNote format requirements
README.zh-CN.md exists with Chinese translation of key README sections

tasks.title: Polish 6 post drafts and verify platform compliance
tasks.user_scenario: CEO opens posts.md and each post is ready to copy-paste into 小红书 with confidence that character counts, hashtag counts, and content quality are publication-grade.
tasks.scope: Review and polish all 6 post drafts. Verify title under 18 Chinese characters, body under 1000 characters, hashtags 10 or fewer. Improve Chinese naturalness. Verify GitHub repo and npm package references. Append compliance checklist.

dod.criterion: All 6 post titles are 18 Chinese characters or fewer (小红书 platform limit)
All 6 post bodies are under 1,000 Chinese characters (with hashtags)
All 6 posts have 10 or fewer hashtags each (小红书 platform limit)
Compliance checklist appended to posts.md showing per-post pass/fail for title length, body length, hashtag count

tasks.title: Create visual asset specification with platform-formatted requirements
tasks.user_scenario: CEO knows exactly what visual assets are needed for each post, what format they must be in, and which existing assets can be reused vs what needs to be created.
tasks.scope: Create visual-assets.md specifying per-post visual requirements: dimensions (images 1242x1660px 3:4, video 1080x1920 9:16), which existing assets can be reused (demo.gif, dashboard-full.png, demo.mp4), what needs creation. Include summary table.

dod.criterion: visual-assets.md exists with per-post visual requirements listing exact dimensions, aspect ratios, and file format
Each existing asset (demo.gif, dashboard-full.png, demo.mp4) has a reuse plan with required transformations
Summary table lists all required assets with source (existing/create), target dimensions, and status
All dimension specs match 小红书 platform requirements (images: 3:4 preferred, video: 9:16)

tasks.title: Create Chinese README (README.zh-CN.md) for GitHub
tasks.user_scenario: A Chinese developer clicking through from 小红书 to GitHub sees a native Chinese README linked from the top of the English README.
tasks.scope: Create README.zh-CN.md at repo root. Natural Chinese (not mechanical translation). Include language switcher, intro, pipeline overview, quickstart, team, tech stack. Add language switcher to English README.md. Target 150-250 lines.

dod.criterion: README.zh-CN.md exists at repo root with all major sections (intro, pipeline, quickstart, team, tech stack)
Chinese content reads naturally (not machine-translated) and follows strategy.md tone guidance
English README.md has a language switcher line at the top linking to README.zh-CN.md
README.zh-CN.md is between 150-250 lines and includes same badge links and demo video embed as English version

tasks.title: Compile ready-to-post launch package with posting instructions
tasks.user_scenario: CEO has a single document that serves as a step-by-step posting guide for 小红书 — open it, follow instructions, posts go live.
tasks.scope: Create launch-package.md with pre-launch checklist, per-week posting guide (12 calendar slots with ready-to-paste text), engagement playbook with Chinese response templates, posting times, cross-reference to README.zh-CN.md.

dod.criterion: launch-package.md exists with pre-launch checklist, per-week posting guide, and engagement playbook
Each of the 12 calendar slots has ready-to-paste post text
Engagement playbook includes 5+ template responses in Chinese for common 小红书 comments
Document references visual-assets.md for asset requirements and README.zh-CN.md as the GitHub landing page
